publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-11-06 23:59:10 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Loose-leaf volumes of letters to Michael Straight, 1931-1968; letters of Leonard K. Elmhirst, 1935-1973; letters of Margaret Barr; letters relating to Cambridge University, including the Cambridge University Union Society, H. J. Laski, the Totnes Labour Party, the Apostles, the South African Grand Prix, academics, Gerald Heard, and Teresa Major; letters of John Cornford; letters from Herta Thiele; correspondence with Belinda Crompton; papers relating to work in Washington, 1938-1943, including the Committee for Democratic Defense, the Fight for Freedom Rally, the Foreign Correspondents Dinner, the Economic Policy Club, and the Mont Tremblant Conference (organized by the Institute of Pacific Relations); papers relating to the American Veterans Committee; papers relating to the American section of Amnesty; miscellaneous correspondence; papers relating to the American Dance Theatre, 1965-1967; papers relating to Cornell University; items relating to research on Caravaggio; files on paintings and painters, including Rico Lebrun, Giorgione, Melzi, and Samuel Morse; files relating to the National Endowment for the Arts; FBI files requested under the Freedom of Information Act; clippings and letters relating to Anthony Blunt, papers relating to Straight's book After Long Silence; and files relating to Nancy Hanks (NEA). Also, notes for his novel CARRINGTON; copy of play "Caravaggio," typescripts on Anthony Blunt and notes on The Haunted Wood, 2002.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Michael Whitney Straight Papers, #4465. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.persname: Straight, Michael Whitney. (Title of work: Carrington..)
Straight, Michael Whitney. (Title of work: After long silence..)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence kept in roughly chronological order in binders by Straight. Box 1, folder 1--box 2, folder 6 span July 1931-December 1968; Box 2, folders 7--18 span November 1935-March 1974.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, notes, newspaper clippings, periodicals, manuscripts, lectures, photographs, and other papers organized and boxed by Straight roughly in chronological order.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Box numbers appear as labelled by Straight.

did.unittitle: WDS (Willard Straight) memorabilia. DWE (Dorothy Whitney Elmhirst) services. Letters from friends. The Arts at DH (Dartington Hall). DH News. LKE stock taking 1967. M. Young -- reviews --MS critique of book. W.A. Swanberg. Letters to MS on biography of WCW/DWE
DWE (Dorothy Whitney Straight): dry plates, invitations, photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes glass plates.

did.unittitle: MS (Michael Straight) letters to DWE 1926. Miss Gardner letters to DWE about MS. Early photographs. Telegram WDS on birth of MD. Straight geneaology. Gwen Hay
MS early diaries. D. Hall articles. Diaries. School reports
MS. D. Hall, diaries, sketches, play
D. Hall, 1927-37. MS writing. How M? Found God, 1928
Dartington, 1930-1937. India diary, 1930. Letters to MS

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Union, Keynes, Tess, Apostles, John Comford, academics, Grand Prix, etc."-- box label.

did.unittitle: Letters - BCS (Belinda Crompton Straight) to MS

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Story: the Violin in the Grave; Fight for Freedom; Committee for Demo. Defense; Makes this the Last War: letters and memos; Economic Policy Club"-- box label.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letters to MS from FDR, H. Ickes, J. Simonds, and several others (full list on box); and letters from MS to DWE.

did.unittitle: Letters to MS. Material relating to time in USAAF

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes rations, pilot log, and photograph of Straight with Belinda Crompton.

did.unittitle: New Republic. H.A. Wallace European tour. US tour letters to BC. Letters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter writers listed on box.

did.unittitle: New Republic. Letters. Memos. Press clips
Press clips. A.V.C. Trial by Television. Letter on T by T from J. Welch, H. Jackson, etc. (2nd edition)
Copies of Green Spring Menemsha Gazette

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "C. Walston, B. Duran, M. Ash, R. Ash, M. Young, W.K. Elmhirst, H. Walston"-- box label.

did.unittitle: L. Dolivet congressional record. Gustavo Duran letters to MS. Memoranda on loyalty charges. Press clips
Carrington. Letters to MS in response to his queries. Research
Carrington. Letters to MS from readers of book
Carrington. Promotion reviews. MS articles. MS lectures
Western magazines containing reviews of MS books, reviews by MS

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter writers listed on box.

did.unittitle: A Very Small Remnant. Letters on research. Xerox copy research
A Very Small Remnant. Handwritten mss. Dramatization for film (1985)
A Very Small Remnant. Photos, letters from readers -- UK. Promotion and publishing
Miscellany: 1950-1967. Speeches, letters, controversies, hearings on foundations. MS notebook: 1951-60. Much of this used for "For Noah"
Cornell: Publications. W.S. Hall, Paintings, Archives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes undated photograph of DWE.

did.unittitle: MS mss for Happy and Hopeless
Caravaggio. Research. Scores for Songs. Notes for director
Caravaggio. Productions-- Ithaca Players, HB Studio New Orleans. Cincinnati. Reviews and articles. Letters from agents
Caravaggio. Letters, promotion, films, etc. R. Owen opera

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter writers listed on box.

did.unittitle: Caravaggio. Research material, musical scores. MS lecture to Natl Gallery and slides
Dorothy Straight. Christening the Dorothy, Newport News
Paintings now at Cornell. Pordenone, Previtali, Vivarini, F. de Francioci, Ridolfo Ghirlandiao

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs and transparencies.

did.unittitle: Paintings. Rico Lebrun. Photographs. Correspondence. Triptych and other works
Paintings given to the White House, National Gallery, Pittsburgh, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Giorgione, Melzi, Samuel Morse, R. Ghirlandio, Bacchiacca, W. Orphen"--box label. Includes photographs.

did.unittitle: Paintings -- miscellaneous. B. Hendricks. Correspondence: Sherman Lee and others

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs.

did.unittitle: MS poem. Letters to MS from NAS, Newton Steers, Ivan Steers, J. Onassis, Gore Vidal
NEA (National Endowment for the Arts). MS speeches in order
NEA. Addresses of council and staff. Appointment books
NEA trip reports (used in oral history)
NEA. Letters to MS mainly at end of his terms in office
Twigs for an Eagles Nest. Reviews and letters
Letters to MS from Dartington and GB (Great Britain)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Ruth Ash, M. Ash, M. Young, Watsons"-- box label. Additional letter writers listed on box.

did.unittitle: Oral history II-P686-end and index, appendix
ALS (After Long Silence)/Blunt. 1982-84. BBC. Press clips 1982, 1983. Observer serial articles of ALS. Reviews
Blunt. British press on death of Blunt March 1983. Leo Long. British press 1981, 1982, 1983 mostly on MS interviews
Blunt/ALS. Letters to FBI, CIA on files. Lord Meyer libel. Etc.
ALS /GB. Letters to Collins. Clearances. Leonard Miall corrections. M. Greenberg exchanges. Dr. B. Straight objections
ALS (After Long Silence). US press comments

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Harpers, NY Review, Newsweek, New Leader"--box label.

did.unittitle: ALS. MS vs. New Republic. MS vs. AIM
ALS. Letters from US readers. MS replies

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter writers listed on box.

did.unittitle: Boulder conference on world affairs. Speakers lists, programs. MS speech "Death of a Butterfly"
NH (Nancy Hanks). Personal memos MS/NH. Memos from MS to NH on panels, e tc., visual arts. Article on MS/NH. Congressional testimony
N. Hanks. Administration, council, panels, mostly Beth Alexiou memos
Nancy Hanks. Trouble file. Am. Lit. Anthol., etc.
Nancy Hanks. NEA and trade unions
Nancy Hanks. Press clips, photo MS NH RMN, memos
Nancy Hanks, Illness, death, memorials, Beth's file letters to her from NH
Nancy Hanks: an Intimate Portrait. Responses from readers, Nov. 1988-. Reviews
Nancy Hanks. Correspondence on oral history
Nancy Hanks. Letters MS/Duke University Press. Promotion material. Addresses. MS memos to Peter Jessup. NR letter to NH
Chilmark. Old records and letters R. Baldwin
Photos used in For Noah and extra pages
Blunt. Press clippings, Nov. 1979-March 1981. November 1981 (Leo Long), Noel Annani, TLS review of Boyle

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "McNeill Lehrer, Wall St. Journal, Cord Meyer, Harper and Row, John Costello"--box label.

did.unittitle: Blunt and Friends. Magazine articles and reviews. Peter Wright, John Costello, V. Rothschild, J.J. Angleton

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter writers listed on box.

did.unittitle: ALS. Follow-up correspondence with other authors working in intelligence/USSR area. H. Norman article and exchanges

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter writers listed on box.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter writers listed on box.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes research notes, family photographs, sound recordings, and other miscellaneous materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes draft of "Sand Creek: a Novelist's View" by MS, "On the Writing of Carrington" pamphlet, and April 1963 issue of the Denver Westerners Monthly Roundup.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Script by Straight.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reviews by and about Straight.

did.unittitle: Recorded tape of radio critic's review of "Carrington"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Event program.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly books by Michael Straight, including Carrington (1960), Trial by Television (1954), and For Noah (1980).
